test.name: Reclassify assertions should route to assertion-classification, not record-extraction
test.description: User asks to re-classify evidence types on existing assertions. record-extraction writes best-effort classifications during extraction; refinement is assertion-classification's job. This tests the extract-vs-refine boundary.

input.user_message: I've extracted several assertions from the 1850 and 1870 census records. Now I want you to re-examine the evidence_type classifications — some of the 'indirect' labels might actually be 'direct' given what the records explicitly state. Please reclassify them.

negative.explanation: The user wants to refine evidence classifications on already-extracted assertions. record-extraction writes best-effort classifications during extraction; assertion-classification is the skill that re-examines and refines those classifications. There is no new record to extract from — the user is asking to re-evaluate existing work.

judge_context: Should route to assertion-classification; record-extraction should decline because there is no new record to extract — the user wants to refine existing classifications
